faction_cards.name: Shadow Monastery
faction_cards.tagline: Master the gate before the gate masters you.

faction_cards.name: Radiant Crusade
faction_cards.tagline: Light is not soft. It is judgment with a banner.

faction_cards.name: Cult of Ophiuchus
faction_cards.tagline: The cure and the venom share one cup.

faction_cards.name: Order of the Black Sun
faction_cards.tagline: When crowns collide, the eclipse records the debt.

faction_cards.name: Knights of Lernia
faction_cards.tagline: What is broken may rise, but never unchanged.

faction_cards.name: Knights of the Ebon Shield
faction_cards.tagline: No road opens until the shield decides.

faction_cards.name: Blue Crest Fleet
faction_cards.tagline: The sea bends to no throne, but it remembers every captain.

faction_cards.name: Black Spider Seminary
faction_cards.tagline: Every vow is silk until power pulls it tight.

faction_cards.name: Aurelian Guardian Academy
faction_cards.tagline: Clarity first. Restraint always. Protection when required.

leader_character_sheets.name: Captain Nyssa
leader_character_sheets.visual_prompt: short blonde commander in red gold white armor, radiant crusade banner, cinematic dark fantasy, non explicit

leader_character_sheets.name: Lera
leader_character_sheets.visual_prompt: dark fantasy monastery leader, black violet robes, velvet grin, symbolic power aura, non explicit

leader_character_sheets.name: Velrya
leader_character_sheets.visual_prompt: shadow syndicate queen, violet black ceremonial armor, serpent smoke, cinematic non explicit

leader_character_sheets.name: Black Sun Warden Commander
leader_character_sheets.visual_prompt: black red gold eclipse warden, anubis inspired sigil, sacred archive chamber, non explicit

leader_character_sheets.name: Serpent Hierophant Veyron
leader_character_sheets.visual_prompt: serpent priest in green black neon yellow robes, oracle temple, luminous snakes, non explicit

leader_character_sheets.name: Malvoth the Red Knight
leader_character_sheets.visual_prompt: massive red gold lion knight with greatsword, crusade battlefield, cinematic fantasy, non explicit

leader_character_sheets.name: Admiral Marella Vayne
leader_character_sheets.visual_prompt: charismatic navy indigo admiral on ship Leviathan, ocean storm, sword and captain coat, non explicit

leader_character_sheets.name: The Black Knight of the Green Scar
leader_character_sheets.visual_prompt: silent black knight guarding bridge above glowing green scar, never yielding, dark fantasy, non explicit

leader_character_sheets.name: Saint Solara / Fallen Solara
leader_character_sheets.visual_prompt: fallen saint in white gold armor with shadowed halo, guardian academy temple, non explicit

prompt_pack_entries: Create a collectible faction card for [FACTION] with dark fantasy border, sigil, motto, leader portrait, and three lore hooks.
Create a leader RPG sheet for [CHARACTER] including faction, oath, flaw, rival, relic, and arena move as symbolic fantasy only.
Generate a Shadow Arena trial where [FACTION A] and [FACTION B] settle a dispute through champion ritual, verdict, and crowd vote.
Design a Hydra Labyrinth side quest involving a sealed gate, an NPC test, a moral choice, and a nonviolent resolution path.
Create a cinematic poster for [LEADER] standing before their faction army, platform-safe, non-explicit, premium dark fantasy.
Write a 300-word codex page about [RELIC] and how it changes faction politics.
Generate 5 Instagram carousel captions for [FACTION] using hook, lore, CTA, and comment keyword.
Create a Discord event script for a Shadow Arena faction vote with roles, polls, and reward badges.
Create a Founder Pack product description for [FACTION] fans with prompt cards, lore pages, and digital badges.
Generate a 9-card prompt mini-pack for [LEADER] covering portrait, battle stance, throne room, relic, rival, oath, betrayal, victory, and exile.
Create a non-explicit gothic court intrigue scene between [CHARACTER A] and [CHARACTER B].
Design a naval crown civilization card for the Blue Crest Fleet with ship classes, admiral laws, and sea rites.
Generate a forbidden bridge encounter with the Black Knight where the player must earn passage without combat.
Create a Black Sun judgment scene using eclipse archive, oath tablets, and neutral verdict language.
Write a Shadow Monastery training codex page focused on discipline, perception, restraint, and symbolic gates.
Create an Aurelian Guardian Academy lesson card about awareness, positioning, restraint, and ethical protection.
Generate a Cult of Ophiuchus oracle prophecy that can be read three different ways.
Create a Knights of Lernia redemption quest for a broken knight carrying a cursed relic.
Design a Spider Seminary political trial with silk vows, hidden witnesses, and a Web Crown verdict.
Create a Shadow Arena scoreboard template with faction points, crowd heat, relic stakes, and verdict result.
Generate a ManyChat comment keyword campaign for [PRODUCT] with DM flow and tracked link CTA.
Write a Whop/Gumroad product fulfillment message for the Founder Pack.
Create a Supabase event log example for content click, keyword trigger, Discord join, and purchase.
Generate a mobile RTS-style world map description for Realm of 5 Crowns with faction territories.
Create a Hydra Visualiser manifest entry for [CHARACTER] with image prompts, lore, tags, and product routing.
Write a Scale/Test/Kill report for three content posts using views, clicks, joins, and purchases.
Create a 7-day launch calendar for Choose Your Crown with daily drop, keyword, offer, and event.

shadow_arena_trials.name: Trial of the Sealed Bridge
shadow_arena_trials.hook: The Ebon Shield blocks all passage above the Green Scar.
shadow_arena_trials.resolution: earn passage through oath, relic proof, or crowd verdict

shadow_arena_trials.name: The Scarlet Verdict
shadow_arena_trials.hook: Nyssa challenges Lera over a monastery defection.
shadow_arena_trials.resolution: honor debate, champion stance, public vote

shadow_arena_trials.name: Eclipse Arbitration
shadow_arena_trials.hook: The Black Sun judges a relic dispute between three crowns.
shadow_arena_trials.resolution: evidence cards, oath tablets, neutral ruling

shadow_arena_trials.name: Serpent Cure, Serpent Curse
shadow_arena_trials.hook: Ophiuchus offers a cure with hidden cost.
shadow_arena_trials.resolution: oracle reading, risk choice, faction consequence

shadow_arena_trials.name: Leviathan’s Toast
shadow_arena_trials.hook: Marella settles a naval insult with wit, drink, and blade ceremony.
shadow_arena_trials.resolution: oratory challenge, navigation test, captain vote

shadow_arena_trials.name: The Web Crown Hearing
shadow_arena_trials.hook: Spider Seminary accuses a noble of oath-theft.
shadow_arena_trials.resolution: witness web, silk contract, political verdict

shadow_arena_trials.name: Lernia’s Broken Bell
shadow_arena_trials.hook: A fallen knight seeks restoration but the relic refuses him.

shadow_arena_trials.name: Aurelian Line of Restraint
shadow_arena_trials.hook: Guardians must stop a riot of crowns without escalation.

shadow_arena_trials.name: The Violet Gate
shadow_arena_trials.hook: Velrya returns with a syndicate claim on the Monastery throne.
shadow_arena_trials.resolution: shadow debate, faction vote, exile or coronation

hydra_labyrinth_side_quests.name: The Green Scar Pilgrimage
hydra_labyrinth_side_quests.objective: discover why only Saint Eliot of Noreen was granted passage

hydra_labyrinth_side_quests.name: Nine Keys of the Violet Gate
hydra_labyrinth_side_quests.objective: recover symbolic keys from nine monastery chambers

hydra_labyrinth_side_quests.name: The Leviathan Compass
hydra_labyrinth_side_quests.objective: help Marella find a route through a living storm

hydra_labyrinth_side_quests.name: The Eclipse Ledger
hydra_labyrinth_side_quests.objective: audit broken oaths in the Black Sun archive

hydra_labyrinth_side_quests.name: The Silk Witness
hydra_labyrinth_side_quests.objective: protect a witness inside the Spider Seminary court

hydra_labyrinth_side_quests.name: The Broken Bell of Lernia
hydra_labyrinth_side_quests.objective: restore a knightly relic without awakening its curse

hydra_labyrinth_side_quests.name: The Guardian’s Quiet Hour
hydra_labyrinth_side_quests.objective: resolve a faction conflict through restraint and clarity

hydra_labyrinth_side_quests.name: The Three Sisters’ Ashes
hydra_labyrinth_side_quests.objective: uncover what split Nyssa, Lera, and Velrya before the war

founder_pack_sales_copy.headline: Choose Your Crown. Enter the Realm of 5 Crowns.
founder_pack_sales_copy.subheadline: A premium dark-fantasy prompt, lore, and faction starter pack for building cinematic AI characters, codex pages, and Shadow Arena campaigns.
founder_pack_sales_copy.cta: Claim the Founder Pack and comment CROWN to unlock your faction path.
founder_pack_sales_copy.disclaimer: Fictional creative product. Platform-safe, non-explicit, non-operational fantasy content.
